        in_memory_fallback_enabled=True,

except Exception as exc:
    _STORAGE_FALLBACK_REASON = f"Limiter init failed: {exc.__class__.__name__}: {exc}"
    _STORAGE_URI = "memory://"
    _STORAGE_OPTIONS = {}
    limiter = Limiter(
        key_func=get_remote_address, # Use key_func argument
        default_limits=[],
        storage_uri=_STORAGE_URI,
        storage_options=_STORAGE_OPTIONS,
        strategy="fixed-window"
        # DO NOT pass app=app here
    )

EFFECTIVE_RATELIMIT_STORAGE_URI = _STORAGE_URI
RATELIMIT_STORAGE_FALLBACK_REASON = _STORAGE_FALLBACK_REASON
RATELIMIT_REDIS_PREREQ_STATUS = _REDIS_PREREQ_STATUS
